verdicts.note: The purpose and cost fields are supported, but the pro summary refers to a named public service that the dossier does not identify; it supports only additional regular-levy revenue.

review_notes: All four tax mappings were independently checked. The county lid lift warrants direction 2; continuations and the one-year renewal warrant direction 1. The three service-specific displays are supported. The county measure's pro-summary wording overstates the dossier and is flagged above. No dossier establishes service expansion or another distinct spending-pole rationale, so no missing mapping is proposed.
